Projects.title: Vancouver Neighborhood Safety Application
desc: Developed an interactive dashboard to with a team of 2 Data scientists to analyze and visualize Vancouver Police Department (VPD) crime data.
Facilitated safer, data-driven housing choices for home searchers navigating a real estate market of over 700,000 people. The project was entirely managed via GitHub.
Utilized Python and Pandas for robust data processing, and built dynamic, interactive visualizations using Shiny, Plotly, and Altair.

Projects.title: You Need a Dictionary (Python Package)
desc: Collaborated with a team of data scientists to develop a Python package ('You Need a Dictionary') that analyzes and visualizes sentiment shifts caused by lexical substitutions in text.
Managed the end-to-end package lifecycle using Hatch and GitHub Workflows for CI/CD, incorporating Pytest for automated testing.
Documented the project thoroughly using Quarto before successfully publishing the package to PyPI.

Projects.title: AfroSLM Multilingual Translation Model
desc: Supported the development of the AfroSLM multilingual language translation model for Equalyz AI.
Performed extensive data preprocessing and augmentation to significantly improve generative AI performance.
Specifically focused on enhancing the accuracy and fluency of translation from English to Yoruba.

Projects.title: Delur Customer Analysis
desc: Collaborated on a project with 10Alytics to help Delur Services address inconsistencies in their return rates, aiming to reach a target return rate of 5% in the upcoming year.
Performed comprehensive data cleaning and exploratory data analysis using Python to identify underlying trends.
Exported the processed results to Tableau to create compelling visualizations and share actionable insights with key stakeholders.

Projects.title: Jumani Sales Analysis
desc: Developed a comprehensive dashboard providing a summary of sales performance for the Jumanji team.
Categorized and analyzed data across various dimensions, including product types, geographical states, payment methods, and staff members.
The primary purpose of this dashboard is to offer significant insights that actively shape and drive data-driven decision-making for the business.

Projects.title: Nigerian Graduates Survey Analysis
desc: Investigated the factors influencing the employability of Nigerian graduates based on survey responses from individuals who completed their degrees between 2013 and 2017.

Explored correlations between employability and academic programs, assessed the influence of tertiary institution types (Private vs. Public), and evaluated the importance of the compulsory National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) program on post-graduation employment.
Developed an interactive response dashboard using Microsoft PowerBI to visualize these critical findings and provide clear, data-backed answers to the research questions.
